Today’s Woot offer, however, delivers a whopping 72% discount on it to shave $108 off its usual going rate. This is the lowest we have seen this model drop to date, and it’s quite frankly a solid price for a 24-inch IPS 180Hz monitor. It could be a great secondary display for your battlestation if it’s too small to be your main monitor. Head below for more details.

GameStop Double Pro week is live, but it also a sizable collection of deals live for everyone. You will find a selection of PS5, Xbox, and Switch 2 titles marked down to $35 right here, but there is also a selection of games down at $15, including Mario and Luigi: Brothership and Super Mario RPG. That’s up to 75% off on these two Switch games and easily some of the best deals we have ever tracked. But there are loads of other titles you’ll at least want to quickly browse through in case there are any that catch your eye:

  • GameStop games for $15
    • PS5, Xbox, and Switch 
  • GameStop games for $35
    • PS5, Xbox, and Switch 2

Microsoft’s upcoming compact cloud gaming controller with Wi-Fi 6 shows up in new leak

items.title: 9to5Toys Battlestation Weekly: Xbox Elite 3 gamepad leak, gaming monitors up to $442 off, more
items.summary:
Welcome to 9to5Toys Battlestation Weekly – your go-to spot for the notable deals and latest releases in PC gaming at a glance every Saturday morning. We just wrapped up another packed week filled with deals across a wide range of gaming accessories and PC gear. From powerful gaming rigs and high-refresh OLED monitors to desk essentials and peripherals, there are still plenty of great offers up for grabs. We also tracked a wave of solid computer accessory deals, including discounts on SSDs, enclosures, cables, chargers, and more. On top of that, we got some leaked images of not one but two new Xbox controllers – a compact cloud gaming controller with Wi-Fi 6 and the long-rumored Xbox Elite 3. You’ll find all of that and much more waiting below in this week’s Battlestation Weekly.

items.title: Electrified Weekly – Heybike Ranger 3.0 Pro e-bike at $1,399 low, Tesla Universal Wall Connector $550, Lectric, ENGWE, more
items.summary:
Welcome to 9to5Toys Electrified Weekly – the best place to find all of this week’s best deals and new releases to electrify your life and protect Mother Nature. We’ve got tons of great deals across all four of our categories, but it’s the EV and e-bike sections that are shining the brightest. There’s the official price cut on Tesla’s Universal Wall Connector (J1772 + NACS) Level 2 EV Charger to $550, as well as the weekend flash sale that has dropped the flagship Heybike Ranger 3.0 Pro Comfort Folding e-bike with a $257 bundle of FREE gear to the $1,399 shipped for the first time in 2026. We’ve also got Lectric’s Memorial Day Sale with up to $694 savings and up to $500 price cuts on e-bikes starting from $799, the ongoing lows on three ENGWE e-bikes with bundles starting from $949, and much more. There’s also plenty of power stations and tool deals to jump on, too, which you can find below.
